title: HideNames
description: To enable or disable the rule, use: /gamerule hidenames:hide_names true/false
body:
# HideNames
Simple server-side (and LAN) mod for Minecraft.

### Usage
To enable or disable the rule, use:
/gamerule hidenames:hide_names true/false

### Requires
- Minecraft 1.21.11
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
